---
title: "Configuration Guide"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Configuration Guide}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

# Configuration Guide

The `_starlightr.toml` file controls how your documentation site is built and organized.

## Basic Configuration

```toml
[site]
title = "My Package"
description = "Documentation for my R package"

[[navbar.left]]
text = "Home"
href = "index.md"

[[navbar.left]]
text = "Reference"
href = "reference/"

[[navbar.left]]
text = "Articles"
href = "articles/"

[[navbar.right]]
icon = "github"
href = "https://github.com/user/repo"
```

## Organizing Function Reference

You can organize your functions into logical groups:

```toml
[[sidebar.reference]]
label = "Data Processing"
contents = ["extract_*", "process_*"]

[[sidebar.reference]]
label = "Output Functions"
contents = ["format_*", "write_*"]
```

## Theme Options

Customize the appearance of your site:

```toml
[theme]
color_mode = "auto"  # light, dark, or auto
```

## Content Processing

Control how your documentation is processed:

```toml
[content]
code_sections = ["usage", "examples"]
skip_sections = ["name"]
```
